title: Technical checks
description: ~15 standard storefront checks. grounded_in enforces the no-fabricated-Pass rule. The ~15 row count is enforced by validate.py. Truthfulness rule (Pass/Fail must be artifact-proven; else Warn) is scored by validate.py + the judge.

grounded_in.description: Artifact field the status rests on, or an explicit 'not inspected' note for Warn.
